summary: Completed frontend testing of 20+ SEO/content changes for FixitBay appliance repair website. All required features verified as working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All SEO/content changes from the batch of 20+ updates have been verified. The site is working correctly.

homepage_h1.details: H1 reads 'Appliance Repair in San Francisco — Fixed Same Day'

homepage_subtitle.details: Subtitle includes 'Same-day service across SF, Peninsula & Marin'

homepage_in_home_repairs.details: 'Looking for appliance repair near me in San Francisco' text found on homepage

about_page_h2s.details: All 4 H2s verified: 'Meet Andrei — Your Bay Area Appliance Technician', 'Why Homeowners in SF Choose FixitBay', 'Our Service Area', 'Real Reviews from Bay Area Customers'

blog_page_h2s.details: All 3 H2s verified: 'Repair Tips & Guides', 'Appliance Maintenance Advice', 'Common Appliance Problems — Answered'

llm_info_page_title.details: Title is 'About FixitBay LLC — For AI & Research'

llm_info_noindex_off.details: Robots meta is 'index, follow, max-image-preview:large, max-snippet:-1, max-video-preview:-1' (noindex is OFF)

llm_info_sections.details: All sections verified: Owner Bio, Pricing, Why Choose, Customer Reviews

refrigerator_repair_faqs.details: FAQs include 'How much does refrigerator repair cost in San Francisco in 2025?' and 'Is it worth repairing a refrigerator in SF?'

washer_repair_faq.details: FAQ includes 'How much does washer repair cost in San Francisco?'

dryer_repair_faq.details: FAQ answer for 'Why is my dryer taking so long to dry clothes?' mentions '$150–$250 repair'

sub_zero_h1.details: H1 contains 'Sub-Zero Appliance Repair San Francisco — Certified Technician'

preconnect_dns_prefetch.details: preconnect for googletagmanager.com and dns-prefetch for google-analytics.com present in head

neighborhood_page.details: Sunset District page contains '[District] is one of San Francisco's most distinctive neighborhoods'
